examples: A disheveled and unshaven Luo yesterday borrowed a uniform from soldiers on the rescue mission.
A disheveled-looking Ms. Stewart nervously took questions in front of about 30 television and video cameras.
They watched with curiosity as several police officers surrounded a disheveled looking man pushing a shopping cart.
Not to stereotype, but Italian men can and do rock the disheveled look pretty often.
Christopher (Jeff Perry), the prolix patriarch, is a disheveled poltergeist of fulmination and cogitation.
